Our Brand Identity
Mend &
Melt
from pain to peace in every drop

Every element of our logo was chosen with intention. Two caring golden hands cradle a running figure — a visual story of going from pain to full, free movement.

The Gold Hands — care, touch, and the therapeutic power of massage.
The Green Figure — a person in motion, free from pain. Green speaks to nature and renewal.
The Circle — wholeness, protection, and the complete healing journey.

Our Founder

Born from real pain,
built with purpose

Mend & Melt started with a simple problem — tired muscles after training, stiff joints after long days, and nothing on the market that felt both effective and luxurious.

So we created it ourselves. Blending arnica, radiata, grapeseed and carefully sourced botanicals, we formulated a massage oil that works as hard as you do — and feels like a spa in every drop.

Made in South Africa, for South Africans who refuse to settle. Every bottle is a promise: from pain to peace.

Our Story

Healing that feels indulgent,
intentional & effortless

Mend & Melt was born from a simple belief: that taking care of yourself should feel like a luxury, not a chore. Inspired by the idea of healing the body while calming the mind, we crafted a range of premium massage oils to help you slow down, unwind, and reconnect.

Every bottle is made in South Africa with carefully selected natural ingredients — formulated to nourish your skin, ease tension, and elevate your self-care ritual.

What’s Inside

Nature’s finest,
carefully selected

01
Arnica
Powerful botanical renowned for reducing inflammation and easing muscle soreness after physical activity.
02
Radiata
Derived from pine, radiata improves circulation and provides a warming sensation penetrating deep into tired muscles.
03
Grapeseed
Lightweight carrier oil rich in antioxidants, nourishing skin while allowing active ingredients to absorb deeply.
04
Natural Additives
Proprietary blend of botanical extracts to enhance absorption, soothe the senses and elevate every application.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Yes. The South African Health Products Regulatory Authority (SAHPRA) has approved CBD products for consumer use. Our massage oil uses CBD within the legal guidelines and is for external use only.

We deliver nationwide across South Africa. Standard delivery is 3–5 business days. WhatsApp us at +27 81 514 3800 for your order and we’ll confirm delivery details for your area.

A few drops (5–8) is enough for one application area. Warm between palms first, then massage into the affected muscle or joint using circular motions until fully absorbed. A 100ml bottle lasts approximately 4–6 weeks with daily use.

Both use the same premium arnica, radiata and grapeseed base. The CBD version adds a therapeutic dose of CBD which enhances the anti-inflammatory and relaxation properties — ideal for chronic pain, joint issues, or deeper muscle recovery.

Yes — daily use is recommended for best results. Apply before or after physical activity, before bed, or whenever muscles feel tight. External use only. Keep away from eyes and broken skin.

Simply WhatsApp us at +27 81 514 3800 and tell us which product you want. We’ll confirm availability, provide payment details, and arrange delivery. It’s that simple!

How to Use

Simple ritual,
profound results

1
Apply Generously
Dispense a few drops onto your palm and warm between hands.
2
Massage In
Work into painful muscles and joints using circular motions.
3
Use Consistently
Apply before or after activity. External use only.
4
Slow Down
Breathe deeply. Let Mend & Melt do what it was made for.
